channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Music Streaming CEO Develops Open-Source Platform to Track Global Conflicts in Real Time
item.description: Elie Habib, CEO of Anghami, a major Middle Eastern music streaming platform, created World Monitor, an open-source dashboard designed to track global conflicts in real time. Initially a side project, ...

item.title: Pakistan Government Rejects Zalmay Khalilzad's Claim of Daesh-K Commander Killed in Punjab
item.description: The Ministry of Information and Broadcasting in Pakistan has strongly rejected claims made by former US envoy Zalmay Khalilzad regarding the presence and activity of Daesh-Khorasan (also known as ISKP...

item.title: Tinubu Administration Delays Automatic Employment for 210 Outstanding Ex-NYSC Members Seven Months After Approval
item.description: Over seven months don pass since President Bola Tinubu approve automatic employment, scholarships up to doctorate level, and N250,000 cash award each for 210 ex-NYSC members wey distinguish demself du...

item.title: Bomb threat forces precautionary dismissal of students at Quezon NHS
item.description: MANILA, Philippines — Classes at Quezon National High School (QNHS) were disrupted yesterday morning when a bomb threat was posted on the school's social media pages. The threat prompted authorities t...

item.title: Senate Summons Ex-NNPCL Officials Over ₦210 Trillion Audit Queries
item.description: The Nigerian Senate Committee on Public Accounts don yan say dem fit issue arrest warrant against former top officials of the Nigeria National Petroleum Company Limited (NNPCL), including ex-CEO Mele ...

item.title: Two Killed, Four Injured in Parañaque Condominium Shooting Incident
item.description: In Parañaque City, a tragic shooting incident occurred at a condominium basketball court on Wednesday evening, resulting in the deaths of two men and injuries to four others. According to police repor...

item.title: House Committee Orders VP Sara Duterte to Respond to Impeachment Complaints
item.description: The House justice committee has officially directed Vice President Sara Duterte to answer the impeachment complaints filed against her within a 10-day period. If she fails to respond in time, it will ...

item.title: Global shipping shifts towards the Cape route amid Middle East tensions
item.description: In early 2026, armed attacks on Iran caused severe disruption to global maritime trade, highlighting the fragility of supply chains reliant on secure sea routes. Tehran’s closure of the Strait of Horm...

item.title: Anjuman-e-Islam Members Join Hindu Festivities at Grama Devi Temple in Kalghatgi
item.description: In Kalghatgi town of Dharwad district, the nine-day Grama Devi Jatra Mahotsava has been attracting large crowds this week. Significantly, office-bearers of the Anjuman-e-Islam committee in the town pa...

item.title: ShouXin’s Minimalist Cat Drawings Capture Motion and Personality
item.description: Artist ShouXin creates captivating graphite drawings of cats that convey both elegance and chaos with minimal lines. Rather than meticulously detailing every feature, ShouXin focuses on movement and e...

item.title: BEL and Bellatrix Collaborate to Build Advanced Very Low Earth Orbit Satellites
item.description: Bengaluru-based state-run defence electronics company Bharat Electronics Limited (BEL) has entered into a memorandum of understanding with space tech startup Bellatrix Aerospace to jointly design, dev...

item.title: EAC Summit in Arusha to Elect New Chairperson, Tanzania Likely Contender
item.description: Heads of State from all eight East African Community (EAC) member countries are set to meet in Arusha this Saturday at the Arusha International Conference Centre for the 25th Ordinary Summit. The main...

item.title: Nearly 7,000 Indians Repatriated from UAE Amid Travel Disruptions; More Flights Planned
item.description: In a coordinated effort to assist Indian nationals stranded in the United Arab Emirates (UAE) since 28th February, nearly 7,000 citizens have been flown back to India over the past three days. The rep...

item.title: Trump expresses interest in Iran leadership amid escalating U.S.-Iran tensions
item.description: Former U.S. President Donald Trump has stated he wants a role in influencing the selection of Iran's next leader, as tensions between the U.S. and Iran continue to escalate in the region. The announce...

item.title: Canberra Raiders prepare for challenging return to Brookvale against Manly Sea Eagles
item.description: The Canberra Raiders are set to face the Manly Sea Eagles at Brookvale for the first time since last year's heavy defeat. In 2025, the Raiders endured a brutal opening 40 minutes, falling behind 30-0 ...

item.title: 20-year-old from Alliston charged with threats against Ontario Premier Doug Ford
item.description: A 20-year-old man from Alliston, Ontario, has been charged with threatening Premier Doug Ford, according to the Ontario Provincial Police (OPP). The investigation, which began in mid-February, conclud...

item.title: Pakistan Plans Work-From-Home and Distance Learning to Conserve Fuel Amid Regional Oil Crisis
item.description: ISLAMABAD: The government has decided in principle to introduce weekly reviews of petroleum prices starting March 8, alongside contingency measures such as work-from-home and distance learning, to sav...

item.title: IMF-Zambia discussions on new support programme to continue after August elections
item.description: The International Monetary Fund (IMF) has indicated that technical discussions with Zambian authorities on a new support programme could begin in April, but a full agreement is unlikely before the gen...

item.title: OpenAI Launches GPT-5.4 With Integrated Excel and Google Sheets Functionality
item.description: OpenAI has introduced GPT-5.4, an upgraded version of its ChatGPT model, designed to improve efficiency, accuracy, and cost-effectiveness for workplace tasks. This new model allows users to work direc...

item.title: Britney Spears faces legal and personal challenges following DUI arrest
item.description: Britney Spears, the Grammy-winning pop star, was arrested in California for allegedly driving under the influence on Wednesday night. She was detained by the Ventura County Sheriff’s Office and later ...
